---
description: Build end-to-end journey tests from spec and design artifacts.
mode: agent
---

Invoke `@test-explorer` to generate and prioritize user journeys.

## Steps

1. Read `spec.md`, `plan.md`, and `contracts/`.
2. Define golden path and edge journeys.
3. Map each journey to acceptance criteria and test levels.
4. Prioritize journey execution by risk and impact.

Output must include sections: Journeys, Coverage Map, Priority Matrix, Execution Order.
